response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned generalist with strong web/full-stack background and some IDE-adjacent experience (C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI), but the resume shows no Kotlin, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate, and only incidental Java exposure. The core stack (JS/TS, DLang) does not align with an enterprise JVM IDE role requiring deep JVM internals and Spring ecosystem expertise.
strengths: Prior IDE component work in C/C++ at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Long track record across complex systems, OSS projects, and developer tooling
Strong software craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, testing libraries, workshops
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only marginal Java usage listed
No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or application server expertise
Primary recent stack (TypeScript/Node, DLang) is far from JVM tooling focus
